general_axiom_candidates.justification: The relation P463 ("member of") links a person (PER) to a group or organization, which in the ontology is represented by classes inheriting from the ORG superclass such as video game publisher, sports league, and book publisher.

evidence.snippet: ngsbury Huntington ( 13 March 1921 – 5 June 1942 ) , was a naval aircrewman and member of Torpedo Squadron 8 ( or VT-8 ) . He was radioman / gunner to Ensign George Gay 's TBD Devastator a
